name: Niji Moonlit Semi-real Anima
base_prompt: masterpiece, best quality, high-quality Anima anime illustration, clean Niji anime color separation, cool blue accent lighting, cool clean rim light, controlled contrast, refined anime hair detail, crisp 2D anime line clarity, balanced luminous color palette
negative_prompt: worst quality, low quality, score_1, score_2, score_3, artist name, flat pastel coloring, washed out, low contrast

source-color-style-neutral.prompt_prefix: Niji anime coloring, cool blue accent palette, clean color separation, cool rim light, controlled anime contrast
source-color-style-neutral.prompt_suffix: refined 2D anime finish, crisp anime hair detail, balanced luminous background separation
source-color-style-neutral.negative_prompt: black armor, sword, moon, night sky, black hair, woman, armor, medieval costume, source character, exact source pose

source-image-131966887.prompt_prefix: Niji anime color reference, cool blue accent palette, clean color separation, cool rim light, controlled anime contrast
source-image-131966887.prompt_suffix: refined 2D anime finish, crisp anime hair detail, balanced luminous color palette

anime-2d-default.prompt_prefix: daylight niji lock: clear blue sky, cool clean rim light, soft crisp anime shadows, bright school campus; pure hand-drawn 2D Japanese anime
anime-2d-default.prompt_suffix: anime only on face, eyes, lineart; flat matte cel colors, clean ink line, hand-painted background, no 3D lighting
anime-2d-default.negative_prompt: 3d, 3d render, cgi, photorealistic, realistic skin, semi-realistic, glossy skin, glossy highlight rendering, sharp specular highlights, plastic skin, game cg, dark background, night, moonlit, dark cinematic color grading, deep shadow contrast

required_resources.note: MCP StylePreset schema currently exposes one lora field; required_resources is agent-readable metadata. Actual generation must use a custom/workflow-template graph with all three LoraLoaderModelOnly nodes.
